description: Classic tapering monk-strap shoes from provogue for men with a refined, stacked heel.Sleek fuss-free silhouetting on this shoe, makes it a shoe closet essential. Wear this leather shoe with tonal, structured trousers and a crisp shirt and a leather jacket. Upper Genuine leather upper Slip on styling with elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for ease of wearability A strap with cut-out pattern across the midfoot for a customised Fit Leather lining Soft sockliner for instep comfort Brand badge on the lateral side of the midfoot, as a part of the strap buckle Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Textured, two-tone grooves on the forefoot and heel for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
